tasks.label: Start local server (Python 5500)
tasks.command: $existing = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5500 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($existing) { $existing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; py -m http.server 5500

tasks.label: Stop local server (5500)
tasks.command: $pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5500 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($pids) { $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }
